title: Refraxite
description: Refraxite is a aesthetic focused modpack which focuses on performance while retaining pretty visuals
body:
# THE PROJECT HAS BEEN ARCHIVED.
# Refraxite
A Aesthetic focused modpack that doesn't make your game a slideshow
Refraxite (or ref) is a modpack focoused on adding vanilla-style additions which feel right at home while making the game visibly better.
#### Support Me!
[Izya](https://www.twitch.tv/izyalovesgothmommies)
#### Support these amazing people!
